descriptors: 12 distinct visual themes (Highland, Cavelem, Circus, Classic, etc.)
distinctive_elements: Twelve tribes of lemmings with variations in appearance and cultural exuberance
Classic tribe preserves original Lemmings visual characteristics
Tribe-specific visual identities with no mechanical effect on gameplay

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Lemmings 2: The Tribes (SNES)

notes.content_notes: Sources document game mechanics, tribes, and development but contain no specific sprite dimensions, color palette counts, tile sizes, or animation frame counts. Visual design documented qualitatively through tribe descriptions and gameplay mechanics only.
notes.unused_content: Game contains unused graphics and two unused skills (Roller, Skier) with sprite assets
